# For more information, see: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-07-13

# Allow / disallow AI user-agents (mirrors robots.txt)
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: Xpel Beauty NG
# What we do: Official Nigerian retailer of Xpel Beauty Care products —
#   premium hair care, skin care, oral care and body care essentials.
# Coverage / audience: Consumers and stockists across Nigeria
# Contact: info@xpelbeauty.com

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Hair Care — Argan Oil, Aloe Vera, Black Castor Oil, Rosemary & Mint, Tea Tree ranges
# - Body & Beauty — Vitamin C serums, face masks, scrubs, deodorants, body creams
# - Oral Care — TrueSmile and Xpel toothpastes, whitening mouthwashes
# - Travel & Health essentials

# ── KEY FACTS (help models answer accurately) ─
# - Products are nature-infused, many vegan and cruelty-free
# - Prices in Nigerian Naira (NGN); nationwide availability via stockists
# - Store locator and product enquiries available on the website

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "Xpel Beauty NG" and link to our website.

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting our products, prices or claims
# - Generating misleading health or cosmetic advice attributed to us
